summary: A beloved recording capturing smoldering Bird Song and Eyes of the World, delivering a magical 1990 performance.
review: The reviewer rates this show five stars, highlighting the “real smoldering embers” of the performance and naming Bird Song and Eyes of the World as all‑time favorites that they spin regularly. No specific recording details are given, but the emotional impact and nostalgia convey a high‑quality listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: A single glowing five‑star review praises the musical moments strongly; recording quality cannot be assessed, so rating reflects strong show quality with uncertain technical fidelity.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments on soundboard, audience mix, or clarity were provided in the review.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer emphasizes the overall magic and “smoldering embers” of the night rather than specific set pacing.
